# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r2" {
            port 1/1/c1/1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.0.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
        bgp {
            router-id 1.1.1.1
            group "clients" {
                type internal
                peer-as 65001
                next-hop-self true
                cluster {
                    cluster-id 1.1.1.1
                }
            }
            neighbor "10.0.0.1" {
                group "clients"
            }
        }
    }
}
